methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $271M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Robotics & Manufacturing. Range: $1.0B - $2.3B.

private.name: Exotec
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), same stage (Series D), post-money $2B

private.name: Agility Robotics
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), same stage (Series D)

data.narrative:
Path Robotics, a Series D robotics and manufacturing automation company, has raised $271M to date. The valuation analysis draws on two applicable triangulation methods benchmarked against a peer set of four same-sector, same/adjacent-stage companies (Divergent, Exotec, Hadrian, and Nimble Robotics), with valuations ranging $1.0B–$2.3B, plus broader industry comparables including eight private peers and one public comparable.

The Stage-Progression method, applying a 1.5x step-up multiplier typical of Series D advancement, yields $406M. The Peer-Median approach anchors to the four-company median of $1.8B, reflecting the valuation distribution across Robotics & Manufacturing at comparable stages. These methods produce a wide but informative spread reflecting Path's position relative to better-capitalized peers like Exotec ($2.0B, Series D) and earlier-stage, lower-valued companies like Nimble Robotics ($1.0B, Series C).

The triangulated analysis supports a valuation range of $346M (low), $1.1B (median), and $2.1B (high). The wide dispersion—spanning $1.75B between low and high—reflects material uncertainty around market positioning and fundraising momentum relative to the peer cohort. Key uncertainties include Path's competitive positioning versus Exotec and Divergent, customer concentration, and capital efficiency relative to peers. The median of $1.1B represents the central tendency across methods but should be weighted against the peer-median signal of $1.8B when stage and fundraising trajectory are considered.
